expectations.evidence: Verdict: NOT READY — do not activate

expectations.text: Audit correctly identifies that the lack of sprint files is intentional — documented in the README as 'DO NOT EXECUTE' — not treated as a bug or omission
expectations.evidence: Output: 'The plan explicitly states DRAFT — DO NOT EXECUTE SPRINTS YET and the conditions it sets for activation have not been met.' Correctly treats it as an activation-gate issue, not a defect.

expectations.text: Audit names all 3 dependency plans: ux-discovery-v2, frontend-discovery-v2, backend-discovery-v2
expectations.evidence: Table with Required output column listing UX2-R1 through BE2-R3 output files, implying all three plans. Plans named explicitly in the path to activation section.

expectations.text: Audit states the activation condition: sprint files can be written only after all discovery outputs are available
expectations.evidence: Path to activation: 'run the three discovery plans (they can go in parallel), confirm all 9 output files are produced, then draft sprints P1–P4'

expectations.text: Audit reads the prior art (expired/src-structure-refactor) and notes inherited decisions still valid
expectations.evidence: Agent read docs/plans/expired/src-structure-refactor/plan/README.md but output only says 'Inherited decisions from src-structure-refactor are correctly documented (6 decisions)' without citing specific decisions — does not confirm still valid

expectations.text: Audit file is written to docs/plans/drafted/folder-structure-v2/audit/ or the workspace output path
expectations.evidence: File saved to workspace output path
